meaning: n.(=Hanuka)光明节(犹太人一纪念节日)
examples: It was the first night of Chanukah and the night before Ellie's last final.
It seemed that Susan had been facing the same dilemma that Ellie had been that first night of Chanukah.
BIGresearch estimates that 94% of midwinter holiday celebrators will observe Christmas, while only 5% will celebrate Chanukah.
More than 90 days ago you could purchase Christmas and Chanukah gift-wrap and greetings cards at major retailers.
And although other holidays, like Chanukah and Kwanza, fall around this time of year, Christmas is the heavy hitter when it comes to spending.
